title: Source Record
description: A source record represents one page, document, or database entry that was accessed, inspected, and saved as raw evidence. Every fact in the system traces back to exactly one source record.

platform.description: Platform code where the source was collected (e.g., tmall, jd, official, xhs, pubmed, nmpa).

title.description: Page title, document title, or descriptive label assigned during collection.

url.description: Full URL of the source page. Use "not_applicable" for offline documents.

snapshot_path.description: Relative path to a saved screenshot, PDF, or archival copy. Use "not_applicable" if no snapshot was saved.

access_notes.description: Free-text notes about access conditions: login required, CAPTCHA, paywall, partial content, dynamic content, page not found. Use "unknown" when access status is not determined.

data_category.description: What kind of information this source primarily supports.
